Collapsible.default: @slot - Renders the collapsible content. template: <slot @slotchange=...>; ::slotted(*) { --m3e-collapsible-animation-duration: initial; } — no type restriction on slotted children

ScrollContainer.default: @slot - Renders the scrollable content. template: <slot @slotchange=...>; no ::slotted type-restricting selector

Slide.default: @slot - Renders the items through which to cycle. template: <slot @slotchange=...>; ::slotted(*) with no tag restriction; handler iterates all assignedElements() and assigns -before/-after CSS classes

TextHighlight.default: @slot - Renders the content to highlight. template: <slot @slotchange=...>; handler walks arbitrary text nodes in any element structure; no ::slotted type restriction

TextOverflow.default: @slot - Renders the content to truncate with an ellipsis. template: ; example usage is plain text string; no ::slotted selector at all — clear text-label intent

FocusTrap.default: @slot - Renders content for which to trap focus. template: ${trap}<slot></slot>${trap}; handler walks all child elements regardless of type to find focusable descendants; no ::slotted restriction

FloatingPanel.default:
@slot - Renders the contents of the panel. template:
; no ::slotted restriction; panel is a generic floating surface accepting arbitrary content

AppBar.leading: @slot leading - Renders content positioned at the start of the bar; handler _handleLeadingIconSlotChange (singular); example shows <m3e-icon-button slot="leading-icon">; no ::slotted restriction but Material 3 leading position is canonically a single icon button
AppBar.title: @slot title - Renders the title of the bar; example Top 10 hiking trails; handler _handleTitleSlotChange; template: ; no ::slotted restriction; clear text-label intent
AppBar.subtitle: @slot subtitle - Renders the subtitle of the bar; example Discover popular trails; handler _handleSubtitleSlotChange; template: ; no ::slotted restriction; clear text-label intent
AppBar.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders one or more action buttons aligned to the end of the bar; handler _handleTrailingIconsSlotChange (pluralised → multi:true); example shows <m3e-icon-button slot="trailing-icon">; no ::slotted type restriction but description explicitly says action buttons

Option.default: @slot - Renders the label of the option. Render: <slot> inside <m3e-text-highlight>. Handler calls getTextContent(e.target) and stores to #textContent; get value() falls back to this textContent — option is non-functional without a label.

Optgroup.default: @slot - Renders the options of the group. MutationController (via OptionPanel) calls querySelectorAll('m3e-option') and checks option.parentElement instanceof M3eOptGroupElement, confirming the group's default slot holds m3e-option elements.
Optgroup.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the group. Handler _M3eOptGroupElement_handleLabelSlotChange: e.target.assignedElements({flatten:true})[0] wired to aria-labelledby; no ::slotted type restriction; CSS .label has font-size/color styling — intent is a text label.

OptionPanel.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the list. querySelectorAll('m3e-option') at panel level; option.parentElement instanceof M3eOptGroupElement confirms optgroup nesting; global style: m3e-option-panel > m3e-divider { margin-block: var(--m3e-option-panel-divider-spacing, 0.5rem) } documents divider as expected direct child.
OptionPanel.no-data: Render: <slot name='no-data'>. Handler _M3eOptionPanelElement_handleNoDataSlotChange only calls hasAssignedNodes(e.target) — no type restriction. CSS .no-data has text colour/font styling suggesting general content; no ::slotted type selector.
OptionPanel.loading: Render: <slot name='loading'>. Handler _M3eOptionPanelElement_handleLoadingSlotChange: querySelector("m3e-loading-indicator[slot='loading'], m3e-circular-progress-indicator[slot='loading']") detects indicator elements for --with-loading-indicator state; CSS .loading has text font/colour styling confirming plain-text use is also designed.

FormField.default: @slot - Renders the control of the field.; isFormFieldControl: instanceof HTMLInputElement|HTMLTextAreaElement|HTMLSelectElement || KNOWN_FORM_FIELD_TAGS=['m3e-input-chip-set','m3e-select']; ::slotted(input), ::slotted(textarea), ::slotted(select), ::slotted(m3e-select), ::slotted(m3e-input-chip-set); handleSlotChange calls findFormFieldControl returning first control
FormField.prefix: @slot prefix - Renders content before the fields's control.; handlePrefixSlotChange only checks assignedElements.length for --with-prefix state, no type restriction; --m3e-form-field-icon-size CSS prop mentions 'prefix and suffix icons' as typical but handler is unrestricted
FormField.prefix-text: @slot prefix-text - Renders text before the fields's control.; no slotchange handler; rendered inside <span class='prefix-text'>; clear text-label intent (e.g. currency symbol)
FormField.label: NOT in @slot JSDoc or CEM — discrepancy: template has <slot name='label' @slotchange='handleLabelSlotChange'>; example shows <label slot='label' for='field'>Text field</label>; ::slotted([slot='label']) applies text-overflow styling; handleLabelSlotChange reads assignedElements[0]?.textContent with no type restriction; trusting template/CSS over omitted JSDoc
FormField.suffix: @slot suffix - Renders content after the fields's control.; handleSuffixSlotChange only checks assignedElements.length for --with-suffix state, no type restriction; --m3e-form-field-icon-size mentions suffix icons as typical but slot is unrestricted
FormField.suffix-text: @slot suffix-text - Renders text after the fields's control.; no slotchange handler; rendered inside <span class='suffix-text'>; clear text-label intent (e.g. unit suffix)
FormField.hint: @slot hint - Renders hint text in the fields's subscript, when the control is valid.; MutationObserver (hintMutationController) reads text content; no type restriction; specific purpose is user-authored hint text
FormField.error: @slot error - Renders error text in the fields's subscript, when the control is invalid.; MutationObserver (errorMutationController) reads text content; template shows <slot name='error'>${this._validationMessage}</slot> fallback; specific purpose is user-authored error text

Autocomplete.default: @slot - Renders the options of the autocomplete.; render template: <slot></slot>; querySelectorAll("m3e-option") + querySelectorAll("m3e-optgroup") + instanceof M3eOptionElement confirm option/optgroup kinds
Autocomplete.loading: @slot loading - Renders content when loading options.; detected via querySelector("[slot='loading']") on clone; fallback span[slot=loading] auto-created if absent; no type restriction on user-provided content
Autocomplete.no-data: @slot no-data - Renders content when there are no options to show.; detected via querySelector("[slot='no-data']") on clone; fallback span[slot=no-data] auto-created if absent; no type restriction on user-provided content

Avatar.default: @slot - Renders the content of the avatar.; template: <slot></slot>; CSS ::slotted(img) styles but does not restrict; examples show text initials, m3e-icon, and img — no querySelector/instanceof filter

Badge.default: @slot - Renders the content of the badge. | template: unnamed with   fallback (dot badge when empty); slotchange handler inspects this.textContent.length to adjust padding — confirms text content intent; no ::slotted type restriction, no querySelector/instanceof check

BottomSheetAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action.; example usage shows text-only content ("Google Keep", "Google Docs"); no ::slotted or querySelector restriction; element acts as clickable label nested within m3e-list-action

BottomSheet.default: @slot - Renders the content of the sheet.; template (line 350): <slot></slot> inside .content div; no ::slotted type selector or querySelector restriction; example places m3e-action-list with multiple m3e-list-action children here
BottomSheet.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the sheet.; template (line 350): <slot name="header"></slot> inside .header div; global CSS adds margin only (m3e-bottom-sheet > [slot="header"] { margin... }); no ::slotted type restriction; --m3e-app-bar-container-color set on .header suggests app-bar is possible but not required

BottomSheetTrigger.default: @slot - Renders the content of the trigger.; example usage: <m3e-bottom-sheet-trigger for="bottomSheet">Open Bottom sheet</m3e-bottom-sheet-trigger>; text label for the trigger button; no ::slotted or querySelector restriction

Breadcrumb.default: @slot - Renders breadcrumb items.; handleSlotChange: querySelectorAll('m3e-breadcrumb-item') iterates all children — breadcrumbItem is the only meaningful content
Breadcrumb.separator: @slot separator - Renders a custom separator between breadcrumb items.; handleSeparatorSlotChange collects assignedElements() with no instanceof/querySelector restriction and clones them verbatim

BreadcrumbItemButton.icon: render: <slot class='icon' name='icon' aria-hidden='true'>; CSS: ::slotted([slot='icon']) { font-size: inherit; flex: none; } + ::slotted(svg[slot='icon']) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }; CEM has no @slot entry (internal element) but template is definitive
BreadcrumbItemButton.default: render: <m3e-text-overflow class='overflow'><slot @slotchange>; isIconOnly() checks if single element ≤28×28px in this slot — icon-only mode explicitly supported; no ::slotted restriction; primary use is text label

BreadcrumbItem.default: @slot - Renders the content of the breadcrumb item.; handleSlotChange: isIconOnly() detects single small element; _updateIconFilled: querySelectorAll('m3e-icon') sets filled — icon explicitly supported alongside text label
BreadcrumbItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the item's label.; forwarded via slot='icon' to inner m3e-breadcrumb-item-button; _updateIconFilled: querySelectorAll('m3e-icon') confirms icon kind

Button.default: @slot - Renders the label of the button. Template: <slot></slot> in .label div, unrestricted; intent is button label text.
Button.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the button's label. CSS: ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { font-size: inherit; flex: none; } ::slotted(svg[slot="icon"]) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }
Button.selected: @slot selected - Renders the label of the button, when selected. Template: <slot name="selected"><slot></slot></slot> wrapping default slot as fallback; label text intent.
Button.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders an icon before the button's label, when selected. CSS: ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]) { font-size: inherit; flex: none; } ::slotted(svg[slot="selected-icon"]) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }
Button.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the button's label. CSS: ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) { font-size: inherit; flex: none; } ::slotted(svg[slot="trailing-icon"]) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }

IconButton.default: @slot - Renders the icon of the button. | render: <slot class="icon" aria-hidden="true"></slot> | updated(): querySelectorAll("m3e-icon") — explicit icon manipulation; ::slotted(svg) also covered by ::slotted(*)
IconButton.selected: @slot selected - Renders an icon, when selected. | render: ${this.toggle ? html`<slot class="icon" name="selected" ...></slot>` : nothing} — only rendered when toggle=true; updated(): querySelectorAll("m3e-icon") toggles filled attribute on slotted icons

ButtonGroup.default: @slot - Renders the buttons of the group.; queryAssignedElements({ slot: "", selector: "m3e-button,m3e-icon-button", flatten: true }); handleChange checks e.target.tagName === "M3E-BUTTON" || e.target.tagName === "M3E-ICON-BUTTON"; render template has a single unnamed <slot>

RichTooltipAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action. (CEM confirms unnamed slot); ActionElementBase provides the default slot; example shows plain text: <m3e-rich-tooltip-action>Learn more</m3e-rich-tooltip-action>; no ::slotted restrictions

RichTooltip.default: @slot - The main supporting text of the tooltip.; render template: <slot @slotchange='...'> (unnamed); _handleContentSlotChange calls getTextContent(e.target, true) — text extraction confirms text semantic; example shows plain prose text; _interactive check uses findInteractiveElements(this) covering ALL slots, not restricting this slot
RichTooltip.subhead: @slot subhead - Optional subhead text displayed above the supporting content.; render template: ; _handleSubheadSlotChange calls getTextContent(e.target, true); example shows New settings available
RichTooltip.actions: @slot actions - Optional action elements displayed at the bottom of the tooltip.; render template: <slot name='actions' @slotchange='...'>; ::slotted([slot='actions']) applies only flex layout styling — no element-type constraint; ::slotted([slot='actions'][end]) similarly no type constraint; example uses <div slot='actions'> as a generic container wrapping buttons

Tooltip.default: @slot - Renders the content of the tooltip.; render template: <slot @slotchange='...'> (unnamed); _handleSlotChange calls getTextContent(e.target, true) and uses result as aria description message; example shows plain text: <m3e-tooltip for='button'>Go Back</m3e-tooltip>; no ::slotted CSS selectors present

Calendar.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the calendar.; render (line 934): <slot name="header">${renderHeader()}</slot> with default fallback content, no ::slotted restriction

Card.default: @slot - Renders the content of the card without padding. Template: <slot @slotchange=handleDefaultSlotChange> nested inside <slot name="content"> as fallback. No ::slotted type restriction; ::slotted(img), ::slotted(video) are layout styling only, not kind constraints. Handler name is singular.
Card.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the card. ::slotted([slot="header"]) applies flex layout; ::slotted(img[slot="header"]), ::slotted(video[slot="header"]) are styling-only (handler checks x.tagName==="IMG"||"VIDEO" only to toggle has-header-media class, not restrict). No kind restriction. Singular handler _M3eCardElement_handleHeaderSlotChange.
Card.content: @slot content - Renders the content of the card with padding. ::slotted([slot="content"]) { flex: 1 1 auto } is layout-only. No kind restriction. Singular handler _M3eCardElement_handleContentSlotChange.
Card.actions: @slot actions - Renders the actions of the card. ::slotted([slot="actions"][end]) { justify-content: flex-end } targets a single container element with [end] attribute; no kind restriction. Singular handler _M3eCardElement_handleActionsSlotChange.
Card.footer: @slot footer - Renders the footer of the card. ::slotted([slot="footer"]) applies flex layout only. No kind restriction. Singular handler _M3eCardElement_handleFooterSlotChange.

Chip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; _renderSlot() renders <slot @slotchange>; _handleSlotChange uses getTextContent(e.target) to track text content
Chip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; _renderIcon() renders <slot name="icon">; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { flex: none; width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-chip-icon-size, 1.125rem) !important; }
Chip.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the chip's label.; _renderTrailingIcon() renders <slot name="trailing-icon">; ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) { flex: none; width: 1em; ... }

AssistChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() from M3eChipElement; _handleSlotChange uses getTextContent
AssistChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; inherits _renderIcon() rendering <slot name="icon">; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) from M3eChipElement.styles

ChipSet.default: @slot - Renders the chips of the set.; render() returns html`<slot></slot>`; no querySelectorAll, instanceof, or ::slotted type-selector in M3eChipSetElement — unrestricted container

FilterChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() from M3eChipElement; _handleSlotChange uses getTextContent
FilterChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; _renderIcon() override wraps super._renderIcon() which renders <slot name="icon">; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) in inherited + FilterChip styles
FilterChip.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the chip's label.; M3eFilterChipElement does NOT override _renderTrailingIcon(), so inherits <slot name="trailing-icon"> from M3eChipElement; ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) in FilterChip.styles

FilterChipSet.default: @slot - Renders the chips of the set.; _handleSlotChange does this.querySelectorAll("m3e-filter-chip") to build selection set

InputChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() rendering <slot>; _handleSlotChange uses getTextContent; programmatic chip creation uses appendChild(createTextNode(value))
InputChip.avatar: @slot avatar - Renders an avatar before the chip's label.; render() has <slot name="avatar" @slotchange="...">; ::slotted(m3e-avatar[slot="avatar"]) { --m3e-avatar-size: ...; --m3e-avatar-font-size: ...; }
InputChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; inherits _renderIcon() rendering <slot name="icon">; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { flex: none; width: 1em; ... }; hidden when avatar is present
InputChip.remove-icon: @slot remove-icon - Renders the icon for the button used to remove the chip.; _renderTrailingIcon() renders <slot name="remove-icon"><svg class="remove-icon">...</svg></slot> inside m3e-icon-button — SVG is the fallback, slot accepts a replacement icon

InputChipSet.default: @slot - Renders the chips of the set.; _handleSlotChange does this.querySelectorAll("m3e-input-chip") to build list; ::slotted(m3e-input-chip) { min-width: 0; } in InputChipSetElement.styles
InputChipSet.input: @slot input - Renders the input element used to add new chips to the set.; _handleInputSlotChange does this.querySelector("input") and wires HTMLInputElement events; ::slotted([slot="input"]) has no tag-type restriction in CSS; no kind in vocabulary for <input> element

SuggestionChip.default: @slot - Renders the label of the chip.; inherits _renderSlot() from M3eChipElement; _handleSlotChange uses getTextContent
SuggestionChip.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the chip's label.; inherits _renderIcon() rendering <slot name="icon">; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) from M3eChipElement.styles; M3eSuggestionChipElement only overrides _renderTrailingIcon() to return nothing

ContentPane.default: @slot - Renders the content of the pane.; template: <slot></slot> inside .scroll-container; no ::slotted selector, no querySelector/instanceof restriction

DialogAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action. No ::slotted type restriction visible; ActionElementBase render not in this file but CEM confirms slot exists. Usage example shows text: <m3e-dialog-action return-value="ok">Close</m3e-dialog-action>.

Dialog.default: @slot - Renders the content of the dialog. Template: <slot></slot> inside <m3e-scroll-container class="content">. No ::slotted type restriction; general body content region.
Dialog.header: @slot header - Renders the header of the dialog. Template: ; used as aria-labelledby target (dialog ARIA label). ::slotted([slot="header"]) applies headline.small typography. Example: Dialog Title.
Dialog.actions: @slot actions - Renders the actions of the dialog. Template: <slot name="actions" @slotchange="handleActionsSlotChange">; ::slotted([slot="actions"]) applies flex layout only (no tag-type restriction). handleActionsSlotChange only checks assignedNodes().length > 0. Example: <div slot="actions" end> container.
Dialog.close-icon: @slot close-icon - Renders the icon of the button used to close the dialog. Rendered inside <m3e-icon-button>; ::slotted([slot="close-icon"]) sets width:1em and icon font-size. Default fallback is an SVG close icon.

DrawerContainer.default: @slot - Renders the main content.; template: <slot></slot> inside .content div; no ::slotted type restriction
DrawerContainer.start: @slot start - Renders the start drawer.; ::slotted([slot="start"]) { height: 100%; width: ... } — attribute-only selector, no element-type restriction; handler: handleStartSlotChange (singular)
DrawerContainer.end: @slot end - Renders the end drawer.; ::slotted([slot="end"]) { height: 100%; width: ... } — attribute-only selector, no element-type restriction; handler: handleEndSlotChange (singular)

Accordion.default: @slot - Renders the panels of the accordion.; ::slotted(m3e-expansion-panel) in styles; querySelectorAll('m3e-expansion-panel') in handleSlotChange — plural 'panels' + type-restricted to m3e-expansion-panel

ExpansionHeader.default: @slot - Renders the content of the header.; <slot> inside <div class='content'>; no ::slotted type restriction on default slot; CSS props --m3e-expansion-header-font-size/weight/line-height/tracking confirm text content intent
ExpansionHeader.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the icon of the expansion toggle.; ::slotted([slot='toggle-icon']) { font-size: inherit !important; flex: none } and ::slotted(svg[slot='toggle-icon']) { width: 1em; height: 1em; } — chevron/arrow icon slot

ExpansionPanel.default: @slot - Renders the detail of the panel.; <slot> inside <div class='content'>; no ::slotted type restriction — general content area
ExpansionPanel.actions: @slot actions - Renders the actions bar of the panel.; ::slotted([slot='actions']) { flex: none; display: flex; align-items: center; column-gap: ... }; ::slotted([slot='actions'][end]) { justify-content: flex-end }; cssprop --m3e-expansion-panel-actions-spacing 'spacing between action buttons or elements'; plural 'actions' implies multi
ExpansionPanel.header: @slot header - Renders the header content.; forwarded into m3e-expansion-header; example: Panel 1; CSS props --m3e-expansion-header-font-* confirm text label intent; no ::slotted type restriction
ExpansionPanel.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the expansion toggle icon.; ::slotted([slot='toggle-icon']) { font-size: inherit !important; flex: none } and ::slotted(svg[slot='toggle-icon']) { width: 1em; height: 1em; } in ExpansionPanel styles; forwarded via <div slot='toggle-icon' class='toggle'><slot name='toggle-icon'>

Fab.default: @slot - Renders the icon of the button.; JSDoc example places <m3e-icon> here (no slot attr); ::slotted(svg:not([slot])) { width:1em; height:1em }; querySelector("m3e-fab-menu-trigger") at line 1048 confirms fab-menu-trigger also lands in default slot
Fab.label: @slot label - Renders the label of an extended button.; <slot name="label"> in template; ::slotted([slot="label"]) { display: none } in .base.with-menu context
Fab.close-icon: @slot close-icon - Renders the close icon when used to open a FAB menu.; template provides fallback <svg class="close-icon"> so slot is optional; ::slotted(svg[slot="close-icon"]) { width:1em; height:1em }

MenuItem.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item.; _M3eMenuItemElement_defaultSlotChangeHandler does assignedElements().find(x => x instanceof M3eMenuTriggerElement) — confirms menuTrigger is an accepted child alongside text labels.
MenuItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the items's label.; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) style selector (no element-type restriction, but icon semantic clear); _M3eMenuItemElement_iconSlotChangeHandler sets --with-icon state.
MenuItem.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the item's label.; ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) style selector; _M3eMenuItemElement_trailingIconSlotChangeHandler sets --with-trailing-icon state. Slot is conditionally rendered: hidden when _hasSubmenu is true.

FabMenu.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the menu. / slotchange handler: querySelectorAll("m3e-fab-menu-item") confirms fabMenuItem restriction; render: <slot @slotchange="..."></slot>

Heading.default: @slot - Renders the content of the heading. Template: `<slot></slot>` (line 178). No ::slotted selectors, no querySelector/instanceof checks. Usage example: `<m3e-heading ...>Page title</m3e-heading>` confirms text-label intent.

ListItem.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; ::slotted(:not([slot])) { font-size: var(--m3e-list-item-font-size,...) } (headline/body typography applied to default slot)
ListItem.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='leading']); _getSlotContentType checks tagName M3E-AVATAR and M3E-ICON; ::slotted(m3e-avatar) in disabled CSS
ListItem.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; ::slotted([slot='overline']) { font-size: var(--m3e-list-item-overline-font-size,...) }
ListItem.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; ::slotted([slot='supporting-text']) { font-size: var(--m3e-list-item-supporting-text-font-size,...) }
ListItem.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders the trailing content of the list item.; ::slotted(span[slot='trailing']) { white-space: nowrap; font-size: var(--m3e-list-item-trailing-text-font-size,...) }; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='trailing'])

List.default: @slot - Renders the items of the list.; handleSlotChange filters instanceof M3eListItemElement (covers all user-facing item subtypes); :host([variant='segmented']) ::slotted(m3e-divider) { display: none } confirms divider is accepted

ListItemButton.default: render() calls super._renderBase() from M3eListItemElement which renders <slot> inside .content; CEM inheritedFrom M3eListItemElement; ::slotted(:not([slot])) typography CSS
ListItemButton.leading: render() calls super._renderBase(); inherits <slot name='leading'> with _handleLeadingSlotChange; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='leading']); _getSlotContentType checks M3E-AVATAR/M3E-ICON
ListItemButton.overline: render() calls super._renderBase(); inherits <slot name='overline'>; ::slotted([slot='overline']) { font-size:... }
ListItemButton.supporting-text: render() calls super._renderBase(); inherits <slot name='supporting-text'>; ::slotted([slot='supporting-text']) { font-size:... }
ListItemButton.trailing: render() calls super._renderBase(); inherits <slot name='trailing'>; ::slotted(span[slot='trailing']) { white-space:nowrap }; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='trailing']); slot[name='trailing'] { align-self: var(--_list-item-button-trailing-align-self) }

ListAction.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; render() has <slot> piped to inner m3e-list-item-button; ::slotted(:not([slot])) typography CSS inherited
ListAction.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; render(): <slot name='leading' slot='leading' @slotchange='_handleLeadingSlotChange'>; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='leading'])
ListAction.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; render(): <slot name='overline' slot='overline'>
ListAction.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; render(): <slot name='supporting-text' slot='supporting-text'>
ListAction.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders the trailing content of the list item.; render(): <slot name='trailing' slot='trailing' @slotchange='_handleTrailingSlotChange'>; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='trailing']); ::slotted(span[slot='trailing']) text styling

ExpandableListItem.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; render(): <slot> piped into inner m3e-list-item-button default slot
ExpandableListItem.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; render(): <slot name='leading' slot='leading' @slotchange='_handleLeadingSlotChange'>; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='leading'])
ExpandableListItem.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; render(): <slot name='overline' slot='overline'>
ExpandableListItem.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; render(): <slot name='supporting-text' slot='supporting-text'>
ExpandableListItem.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders a custom icon for the expand/collapse toggle.; render(): <slot name='toggle-icon'> with SVG fallback; ::slotted(svg[slot='toggle-icon']) { width: 1em; height: 1em; }
ExpandableListItem.items: @slot items - Container for child list items displayed when expanded.; ::slotted([slot='items']) { display: flex; flex-direction: column } no type restriction; handleSlotChange: assignedElements().flatMap(x => x.childNodes.filter(instanceof M3eListItemElement)) — slot takes a wrapper element whose children are items

ActionList.default: @slot - Renders the items of the list.; notifyItemsChange: querySelectorAll('m3e-list-action,m3e-expandable-list-item'); inherits ::slotted(m3e-divider) CSS from M3eListElement

ListOption.default: @slot - Renders the content of the list item.; render(): <slot @slotchange='handleSlotChange'> inside .content; handleSlotChange calls getTextContent(e.target) for value tracking
ListOption.leading: @slot leading - Renders the leading content of the list item.; render(): <slot name='leading' @slotchange='_handleLeadingSlotChange'>; ::slotted(m3e-icon[slot='leading']); _getSlotContentType checks M3E-AVATAR/M3E-ICON
ListOption.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the list item.; render(): <slot name='overline'> inside .content div
ListOption.supporting-text: @slot supporting-text - Renders the supporting text of the list item.; render(): <slot name='supporting-text'> inside .content div
ListOption.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders the trailing content of the list item.; render(): <slot name='trailing' @slotchange='_handleTrailingSlotChange'>; CSS note: :host(:not(:state(--hide-selection))) ::slotted([slot='trailing']) { display: none } — trailing is hidden unless selection indicator is hidden

SelectionList.default: @slot - Renders the items of the list.; notifyItemsChange: this.items.filter(x => x instanceof M3eListOptionElement); inherits ::slotted(m3e-divider) CSS from M3eListElement

MenuTrigger.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the trigger. No render() override in M3eMenuTriggerElement; no ::slotted type restriction.

Menu.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the menu.; _M3eMenuElement_handleSlotChange: querySelectorAll("m3e-menu-item,m3e-menu-item-checkbox,m3e-menu-item-radio"); global registerStyleSheet: m3e-menu > m3e-divider targets dividers; menuItemGroup is a valid structural child.

MenuItemCheckbox.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item.; slotchange handler only calls setCustomState (no instanceof filter); no menuTrigger lookup unlike MenuItem.
MenuItemCheckbox.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the items's label.; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { display: none !important } when checked; _M3eMenuItemCheckboxElement_handleIconSlotChange sets --with-icon state.
MenuItemCheckbox.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the item's label.; ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) style selector from MenuItemElementBase.styles; _M3eMenuItemCheckboxElement_handleTrailingIconSlotChange sets --with-trailing-icon state.

MenuItemGroup.default: @slot - Renders the contents of the group.; render() = html`<slot></slot>`; no ::slotted type selector, no querySelectorAll, no instanceof filter on this element; display:contents host.

MenuItemRadio.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item.; slotchange handler only calls setCustomState (no instanceof filter, identical pattern to MenuItemCheckbox).
MenuItemRadio.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the items's label.; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) style only; _M3eMenuItemRadioElement_handleIconSlotChange sets --with-icon state.
MenuItemRadio.trailing-icon: @slot trailing-icon - Renders an icon after the item's label.; ::slotted([slot="trailing-icon"]) style only; _M3eMenuItemRadioElement_handleTrailingIconSlotChange sets --with-trailing-icon state.

NavBar.default: @slot - Renders the items of the bar.; handleSlotChange does querySelectorAll("m3e-nav-item") — strongly typed to navItem children; unnamed <slot> in render template

NavItem.default: @slot - Renders the label of the item.; unnamed <slot> placed inside <div class="label"> in render template; example shows plain text node as content
NavItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the item.; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { font-size: var(--m3e-nav-item-icon-size, 1.5rem) !important }; querySelectorAll("m3e-icon") in update() to toggle filled attribute
NavItem.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders the icon of the item when selected.; ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]) { font-size: var(--m3e-nav-item-icon-size, 1.5rem) !important }; handleSelectedIconSlotChange sets --with-selected-icon custom state; querySelectorAll("m3e-icon") in update()

NavMenuItem.default: @slot - Renders the nested child items.; handleItemSlotChange: .filter(x => x instanceof M3eNavMenuItemElement_1); unnamed <slot> inside <m3e-collapsible>
NavMenuItem.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the item.; ::slotted(a[slot="label"]) { all: unset; }; handleSlotChange finds HTMLAnchorElement via .find(x => x instanceof HTMLAnchorElement)
NavMenuItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the item.; ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { vertical-align: middle; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: ... }; examples: <m3e-icon slot="icon">
NavMenuItem.badge: @slot badge - Renders the badge of the item.; ::slotted([slot="badge"]) { flex: none; font-size/font-weight/line-height/letter-spacing typography styles }
NavMenuItem.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders the icon of the item when selected.; ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]) { vertical-align: middle; width: 1em; height: 1em; }; renderIcon wraps icon slot as fallback
NavMenuItem.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the toggle icon.; ::slotted([slot="toggle-icon"]) { vertical-align: middle; width: 1em; height: 1em; }; has SVG fallback in template

NavMenu.default: @slot - Renders the items of the menu.; handleSlotChange: querySelectorAll("m3e-nav-menu-item") for selection management + querySelectorAll("m3e-divider") for aria-hidden; examples show m3e-nav-menu-item-group as direct children too

NavMenuItemGroup.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the group.; handleLabelSlotChange sets aria-labelledby on assigned element; examples: <m3e-heading slot="label" variant="label" size="large">
NavMenuItemGroup.default: @slot - Renders the items of the group.; unnamed <slot> in render template; examples show m3e-nav-menu-item as direct children of the group

NavRail.default: @slot - Renders the items of the bar. (inherited from M3eNavBarElement); template: <slot @slotchange=...></slot>; ::slotted(*) flex:none + ::slotted(m3e-fab) specific elevation vars in NavRail styles; global CSS m3e-nav-rail > m3e-icon-button, m3e-nav-rail > m3e-fab; querySelectorAll("m3e-fab") in _updateOrientation; example shows iconButton, fab, navItem as direct children

Select.default: @slot - Renders the options of the select.; template: <slot> inside .options div; this.querySelectorAll("m3e-option") + instanceof M3eOptionElement checks confirm only m3e-option children are processed
Select.arrow: @slot arrow - Renders the dropdown arrow.; ::slotted([slot="arrow"]) { width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-select-icon-size, 1.5rem) } — sized as an icon; default fallback is an inline SVG arrow
Select.value: @slot value - Renders the selected value(s).; template: <slot name="value">${this.selected...label}</slot>; no ::slotted type restriction; default renders selected option label text; slot allows arbitrary override of value display

Paginator.first-page-icon: @slot first-page-icon - Slot for a custom first-page icon.; <slot name="first-page-icon"> inside <m3e-icon-button>; ::slotted([slot="first-page-icon"]) applies SVG sizing
Paginator.previous-page-icon: @slot previous-page-icon - Slot for a custom previous-page icon.; <slot name="previous-page-icon"> inside <m3e-icon-button>; ::slotted([slot="previous-page-icon"]) applies SVG sizing
Paginator.next-page-icon: @slot next-page-icon - Slot for a custom next-page icon.; <slot name="next-page-icon"> inside <m3e-icon-button>; ::slotted([slot="next-page-icon"]) applies SVG sizing
Paginator.last-page-icon: @slot last-page-icon - Slot for a custom last-page icon.; <slot name="last-page-icon"> inside <m3e-icon-button>; ::slotted([slot="last-page-icon"]) applies SVG sizing

CircularProgressIndicator.default: @slot - Renders the content inside the progress indicator. | template line 300: <slot></slot> inside <div class="content">; no ::slotted selector, no querySelector/instanceof restriction

RadioGroup.default: @slot - Renders the radio buttons of the group.; template line 313: bare <slot>; slotchange handler calls this.querySelectorAll("m3e-radio")

SearchBar.leading: @slot leading - Renders content before the input of the bar. CSS: slot[name="leading"] sets --m3e-icon-color, --m3e-icon-button-icon-color, --m3e-icon-size; ::slotted(svg[slot="leading"]) sizes bare SVGs; column-gap on flex container implies multiple icons.
SearchBar.input: @slot input - Renders the input of the bar. Template: <slot name="input">. Code uses .find(x => x instanceof HTMLInputElement) (line 208) to wire up events — accepts native <input>; no vocabulary kind matches, so 'any'.
SearchBar.trailing: @slot trailing - Renders content after the input of the bar. CSS: slot[name="trailing"] sets --m3e-icon-color, --m3e-icon-button-icon-color, --m3e-icon-size; ::slotted(svg[slot="trailing"]) sizes bare SVGs; column-gap on flex container implies multiple action icons.
SearchBar.clear-icon: Template (line 192): <slot name="clear-icon"><svg class="clear-icon">...</svg></slot> inside icon-button — override slot for the clear-button icon. CSS: ::slotted([slot="clear-icon"]) and slot[name="clear-icon"] { --m3e-icon-size }. Not in CEM but present in template.

SearchView.default: @slot - When open, renders the results content of the view. Template (line 451): <slot></slot> inside .scroll-container — unrestricted results area, no ::slotted type selector, no instanceof filter.
SearchView.input: @slot input - Renders the input of the view. Template: <slot name="input" slot="input"> forwarded to inner m3e-search-bar. Code uses .find(x => x instanceof HTMLInputElement) (line 499). No vocabulary kind matches native <input>.
SearchView.open-leading: @slot open-leading - When open, renders content before the input of the view. Template: forwarded as slot="leading" to inner m3e-search-bar when open; inherits same icon/iconButton CSS tokens (--m3e-icon-color, --m3e-icon-button-icon-color, column-gap) as SearchBar leading slot.
SearchView.open-trailing: @slot open-trailing - When open, renders content after the input of the view. Template: forwarded as slot="trailing" to inner m3e-search-bar when open; inherits icon/iconButton CSS tokens and column-gap from SearchBar trailing slot.
SearchView.closed-leading: @slot closed-leading - When closed, renders content before the input of the view. Template: forwarded as slot="leading" to inner m3e-search-bar when not open; same icon/iconButton constraints as SearchBar leading.
SearchView.closed-trailing: @slot closed-trailing - When closed, renders content after the input of the view. Template: forwarded as slot="trailing" to inner m3e-search-bar when not open; same icon/iconButton constraints as SearchBar trailing.
SearchView.search-icon: Template (line 478): <slot name="search-icon"><svg class="search-icon">...</svg></slot> — override for the search icon shown when closed. CSS: ::slotted([slot="search-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: iconSize }. Not in CEM but present in template.
SearchView.close-icon: Template (line 481): <slot name="close-icon"><svg class="close-icon">...</svg></slot> inside m3e-icon-button — override for the back/close icon shown when open. CSS: ::slotted([slot="close-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: iconSize }. Not in CEM but present in template.
SearchView.clear-icon: Template (line 484): <slot name="clear-icon"><svg class="clear-icon">...</svg></slot> inside m3e-icon-button — override for the clear button icon. CSS: ::slotted([slot="clear-icon"]) and slot[name="clear-icon"] { --m3e-icon-size }. Not in CEM but present in template.

ButtonSegment.default: @slot - Renders the label of the option. Wrapped in div.label in render template; no ::slotted tag restriction but purpose is clearly a text label.
ButtonSegment.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the option's label. CSS: .check, ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-segmented-button-icon-size, 1.125rem) !important; }

SegmentedButton.default: @slot - Renders the segments of the button. handleSlotChange does querySelectorAll("m3e-button-segment") to register items; ::slotted(:is(:state(--first), :--first)) and ::slotted(:is(:state(--last), :--last)) CSS shapes the first/last slotted segments.

Shape.default: @slot - Renders the clipped content of the shape. | render: <slot></slot> | ::slotted(img), ::slotted(video) listed in CSS but slot is unrestricted — any content accepted

Skeleton.default: @slot - Renders the content to be mimicked by the skeleton.; template: <slot ?inert="${!this.loaded}" @slotchange="..."></slot>; #createShapes iterates slot.assignedElements() with no type filter — accepts arbitrary elements

SlideGroup.default: @slot - Renders the content to paginate. Template: <slot></slot> inside .content div. No ::slotted type selector or instanceof/querySelector restriction on the default slot. Example shows plain <div> children.
SlideGroup.next-icon: @slot next-icon - Renders the icon to present for the next button. Template: <slot name="next-icon">...</slot> inside <m3e-icon-button>. CSS: ::slotted(next-icon) applies icon sizing. Has default SVG fallback so not required.
SlideGroup.prev-icon: @slot prev-icon - Renders the icon to present for the previous button. Template: <slot name="prev-icon">...</slot> inside <m3e-icon-button>. CSS: ::slotted(prev-icon) applies icon sizing. Has default SVG fallback so not required.

Slider.default: @slot - Renders the thumbs of the slider.; render template: unnamed <slot @slotchange=...>; _handleSlotChange filters assignedElements by instanceof M3eSliderThumbElement; examples show 1–2 thumbs; code clamps _thumbs.length to max 2

Snackbar.default: @slot - Renders the content of the snackbar.; render: ; M3eSnackbar.open() always appends a text node (document.createTextNode), confirming text-only intent; no ::slotted restriction but semantic purpose is clear
Snackbar.close-icon: @slot close-icon - Renders the icon of the button used to close the snackbar.; render: <slot name="close-icon"><svg class="close-icon" ...></svg></slot> (has SVG fallback so not required); ::slotted([slot="close-icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-icon-button-icon-size, 1.5rem) }

SplitButton.leading-button: @slot leading-button - The leading button used to perform the primary action. Handler: .find(x => x instanceof M3eButtonElement) at line 166. ::slotted([slot="leading-button"]) CSS confirms.
SplitButton.trailing-button: @slot trailing-button - The trailing icon button used to open a menu of related actions. Handler: .find(x => x instanceof M3eIconButtonElement) at line 179. ::slotted([slot="trailing-button"]) CSS confirms.

SplitPane.start: @slot start - Renders content at the logical start side of the pane.; template: <slot name="start">; no ::slotted type restriction present; slotchange handler only checks instanceof HTMLElement (generic); example usage shows <m3e-card slot="start"> but no enforcement
SplitPane.end: @slot end - Renders content at the logical end side of the pane.; template: <slot name="end">; no ::slotted type restriction present; slotchange handler only checks instanceof HTMLElement (generic); example usage shows <m3e-card slot="end"> but no enforcement

Stepper.step: @slot step - Renders a step. | template: <slot name="step" @slotchange="..."> | CSS: ::slotted([slot="step"]) {align-self: stretch} | querySelectorAll("[slot='panel']") companion confirms multi-child pattern
Stepper.panel: @slot panel - Renders a panel. | template: <slot name="panel"> (appears twice for above/below header) | querySelectorAll("[slot='panel']") at line 601 confirms multiple panels

StepPanel.default:
@slot - Renders the content of the panel. | template:
— no ::slotted type restriction; examples show forms and arbitrary content
StepPanel.actions: @slot actions- Renders the actions bar of the panel. | CSS: ::slotted([slot="actions"]) {flex: none; display: flex; align-items: center; min-height:...} — only layout styling, no type restriction; examples show a single <div slot="actions"> container

Step.default: @slot - Renders the label of the step. | template: <div class="label"><slot></slot> — specific purpose is the visible step label text; non-functional (unlabeled) without it
Step.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the step. | CSS: ::slotted([slot="icon"]) {width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-step-icon-size, 1.5rem) !important} | template: <slot name="icon">${this.index + 1}</slot>
Step.done-icon: @slot done-icon - Renders the icon of a completed step. | CSS: ::slotted([slot="done-icon"]) {width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-step-icon-size) !important} | template has SVG fallback
Step.edit-icon: @slot edit-icon - Renders the icon of a completed editable step. | CSS: ::slotted([slot="edit-icon"]) {width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-step-icon-size) !important} | template has SVG fallback
Step.error-icon: @slot error-icon - Renders icon of an invalid step. | CSS: ::slotted([slot="error-icon"]) {width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-step-icon-size) !important} | template has SVG fallback
Step.hint: @slot hint - Renders the hint text of the step. | CSS: ::slotted([slot="hint"]) {font-size: var(--m3e-step-hint-font-size); ...} — text typography styling; template: <slot name="hint"> with optional '(Optional)' span fallback
Step.error: @slot error - Renders the error message for an invalid step. | CSS: ::slotted([slot="error"]) {font-size: var(--m3e-step-hint-font-size); ...} — text typography styling; template: <slot name="error">${hint}</slot>

StepperPrevious.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action. | inherits ActionElementBase.render(): html`<slot></slot>` | ActionElementBase.styles: ::slotted(.material-icons) — accepts text or icon content; no type restriction

StepperReset.default: @slot - Renders the content of the action. | inherits ActionElementBase.render(): html`<slot></slot>` | ActionElementBase.styles: ::slotted(.material-icons) — accepts text or icon content; no type restriction

Tab.default: @slot - Renders the label of the tab. Template: — default slot is wrapped in a label span, confirming text/label purpose.
Tab.icon: @slot icon - Renders an icon before the tab's label. CSS: ::slotted([slot="icon"]) { width: 1em; font-size: var(--m3e-tab-icon-size, 1.5rem) !important; } — icon sizing applied.

TabPanel.default: @slot - Renders the content of the panel. Template: <slot></slot> with no ::slotted type selectors or instanceof checks — unrestricted general content.

Tabs.default: @slot - Renders the tabs. handleSlotChange does: this[selectionManager].setItems([...this.querySelectorAll("m3e-tab")]) — explicitly queries for m3e-tab children, confirming tab kind; multiple tabs expected.
Tabs.panel: @slot panel - Renders the panels of the tabs. Template: <slot name="panel"></slot>. Code: [...this.querySelectorAll("[slot='panel']")].indexOf(...) for panel indexing; CSS ::slotted([slot="panel"]) styles panels. Multiple panels expected.
Tabs.next-icon: @slot next-icon - Renders the icon to present for the next button used to paginate. CSS: ::slotted(next-icon) { font-size: var(--m3e-tabs-paginator-button-icon-size) !important; } — icon sizing applied; default is an SVG chevron.
Tabs.prev-icon: @slot prev-icon - Renders the icon to present for the previous button used to paginate. CSS: ::slotted(prev-icon) { font-size: var(--m3e-tabs-paginator-button-icon-size) !important; } — icon sizing applied; default is an SVG chevron.

Theme.default: @slot - Renders content styled by the theme. | render: html`<slot></slot>` — bare unnamed slot, no ::slotted selectors or querySelector restrictions

@slot - Renders the label of the item. | template:
— no ::slotted type restriction; purpose is unambiguously a text label

Toc.default: @slot - Renders content between the header and items. | template: <slot></slot> between .header and .list — no ::slotted or instanceof restriction on default slot; general content region
Toc.overline: @slot overline - Renders the overline of the table of contents. | template: <slot name="overline" @slotchange="..."> | ::slotted([slot="overline"]) applies only typographic styling, no element-type restriction; clear text-label purpose
Toc.title: @slot title - Renders the title of the table of contents. | template: <slot name="title" @slotchange="..."> | ::slotted([slot="title"]) applies only typographic styling, no element-type restriction; clear text-label purpose

TreeItem.label: @slot label - Renders the label of the item. Handler _handleSlotChange checks instanceof HTMLAnchorElement and stores as _link. CSS: ::slotted(a[slot="label"]) { all: unset; } — explicit anchor reset confirms link kind.
TreeItem.icon: @slot icon - Renders the icon of the item. CSS: ::slotted([slot="icon"]) width/height/font-size constraints. querySelectorAll(':scope > m3e-icon[slot]...') at line 199 grabs m3e-icon for this slot.
TreeItem.selected-icon: @slot selected-icon - Renders the icon of the item when selected. CSS: ::slotted([slot="selected-icon"]) with icon-size styling. querySelectorAll(':scope > m3e-icon[slot]...') at line 199 includes this slot.
TreeItem.toggle-icon: @slot toggle-icon - Renders the toggle icon. Template: <slot name="toggle-icon"><svg class="toggle-icon" ...>. CSS: ::slotted([slot="toggle-icon"]) with width/height/font-size icon sizing.
